case_title: AUSTIN HILL SHAW VS. MICHAEL CAMPESINO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,946.00 FILED BY SHAW, AUSTIN HILL AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED SEP-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED SEP-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SHAW, AUSTIN HILL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL $2,982.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,082.00, THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF OCT-13-2013. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, AUSTIN HILL
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY CAMPESINO, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2013 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF OCT-13-2013 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOT MYLES, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. NOTHING REPORTED. DEPT 525

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAW, AUSTIN HILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL $2,982.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,082.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL MAILED TO RESPONDENT SHAW, AUSTIN HILL
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
